# VERIFY: #161 — scope-roadmap-epics agent skips LTM context loading
<!-- Generated by start-feature-planning | Plan sub-agent output -->

**Intent:** Verify that the scope-roadmap-epics skill receives and applies LTM context for epic management rules and domain taxonomy.

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] scope-roadmap-epics SKILL.md declares `epic_rules_path` and `domain_taxonomy_paths` as input fields
- [ ] scope-roadmap-epics process includes steps to read and apply epic management rules
- [ ] scope-roadmap-epics process includes steps to read domain taxonomy for single-module-scope validation
- [ ] plan-roadmap SKILL.md Step 2 explicitly lists LTM paths the agent must discover
- [ ] Backward compatible — skill works when LTM fields are not provided (uses fallback)

### Verification Steps

| Step | Method | Expected Outcome |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| 1 | Read scope-roadmap-epics SKILL.md Input section | `epic_rules_path` and `domain_taxonomy_paths` fields present with descriptions |
| 2 | Read scope-roadmap-epics SKILL.md Process section | Steps for reading rules and taxonomy, applying Rule 2 (single-module-scope) |
| 3 | Read plan-roadmap SKILL.md Step 2 | Explicit LTM discovery instructions for agent |
| 4 | Verify fallback | Skill mentions fallback when paths not provided |
